description:
Farm Steam trading cards, manage achievements, and idle games automatically — an all-in-one alternative to ArchiSteamFarm, Steam Achievement Manager, and Idle Master

Steam Game Idler (SGI) is a Steam automation tool for farming trading cards, managing achievements, and boosting playtime across all games in your Steam library.
What's Changed
- fix(steam-agent): unable to clear credentials in agent mode by @zevnda in #1897
- fix(settings): license key input not always cleared on clear by @zevnda in #1898
- fix(free-games): resolve sync issues in discovery and auto-redeem by @zevnda in #1899
- fix(steam-agent): resolve session resume race by @zevnda in #1900
- fix(free-games): stop auto-redeem from re-reporting an already-claime… by @zevnda in #1901
- refactor(achievement-unlocker): add missing gamer badge to button by @zevnda in #1902
- chore: update icon sizes by @zevnda in #1903
- feat(steam-agent): detect and recover from concurrent-login kicks by @zevnda in #1905
- feat(sort): add recently played sort option to game lists by @zevnda in #1906
Full Changelog: 6.0.4...6.0.5
